violations.text: Food items, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Pasta, Soup, Sauce, Potatoes, and Chicken fingers were observed at 50 DF. Food items were cooked previous day. Food items were voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025

Utensils were observed stored between equipment. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the Cook Double door fridge. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The dumpster outside is located on broken asphalt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025

The food prep area, located downstairs, and the employee's bathroom, located in the kitchen, do not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Hand-washing sinks shall be installed. *Establishment shall not use the downstairs area for food prepping until a hand-washing sink has been installed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the ceiling in the walk-in cooler and areas underneath/side of the cooking area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent builldup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2024

The sink used for food preparation, located downstairs, is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024

A few floor tiles in the kitchen area observed in poor repair. Tiles observed chipped and cracked. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/31/2024
